mapper.insert: INSERT INTO player (user_id, tm_id, jersey_name, jersey_number, position) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tmId}, #{jerseyName}, #{jerseyNumber}, #{position})
mapper.select: SELECT player_id AS playerId, user_id AS userId, team_id AS teamId, team_name AS teamName, team_short_name AS teamShortName, team_logo AS teamLogo, sport_type AS sportType, sport_type_name AS sportTypeName, team_gender AS teamGender, team_gender_name AS teamGenderName, team_description AS teamDescription, member_id AS memberId, role, role_name AS roleName, portrait_photo AS portraitPhoto, join_time AS joinTime, member_update_time AS memberUpdateTime, jersey_name AS jerseyName, jersey_number AS jerseyNumber, position, status, status_name AS statusName, player_create_time AS playerCreateTime, player_update_time AS playerUpdateTime FROM v_player_info WHERE player_id = #{playerId}

SELECT player_id AS playerId, user_id AS userId, team_id AS teamId, team_name AS teamName, team_short_name AS teamShortName, team_logo AS teamLogo, sport_type AS sportType, sport_type_name AS sportTypeName, team_gender AS teamGender, team_gender_name AS teamGenderName, team_description AS teamDescription, member_id AS memberId, role, role_name AS roleName, portrait_photo AS portraitPhoto, join_time AS joinTime, member_update_time AS memberUpdateTime, jersey_name AS jerseyName, jersey_number AS jerseyNumber, position, status, status_name AS statusName, player_create_time AS playerCreateTime, player_update_time AS playerUpdateTime FROM v_player_info WHERE team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY role ASC, jersey_number ASC
